name: Feature Registry System
description: Maintains a per-project registry of code features stored in `.spritely/features/`. Resolves relevant features for a task prompt via Haiku, injects a FEATURE CONTEXT block, and updates the registry after task completion.

Managers/FeatureInitializer.cs.content:
class FeatureInitializer
  Features: List<SonnetFeature>
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  Category: string
  Keywords: List<string>
  PrimaryFiles: List<string>
  SecondaryFiles: List<string>
  RelatedFeatureIds: List<string>
  KeyTypes: List<string>
  Patterns: List<string>
  Dependencies: List<string>
  DependsOnFeatures: List<string>
  InitializeAsync(string projectPath, CancellationToken ct = default) -> Task<FeatureIndex?>
  ScanSourceFiles(string projectPath) -> List<string>
  BuildDirectoryTree(string projectPath, List<string> relativeFiles) -> string
  DetectProjectType(string projectPath) -> string

Managers/FeatureRegistryManager.cs.content:
class FeatureRegistryManager
  RegistryExists(string projectPath) -> bool
  GetFeaturesPath(string projectPath) -> string
  LoadIndexAsync(string projectPath) -> Task<FeatureIndex>
  LoadFeatureAsync(string projectPath, string featureId) -> Task<FeatureEntry?>
  LoadAllFeaturesAsync(string projectPath) -> Task<List<FeatureEntry>>
  SaveFeatureAsync(string projectPath, FeatureEntry feature) -> Task
  RemoveFeatureAsync(string projectPath, string featureId) -> Task
  SaveIndexAsync(string projectPath, FeatureIndex index) -> Task
  BuildFeatureContextBlock(List<FeatureEntry> features) -> string
  RefreshStaleSignaturesAsync(string projectPath, FeatureEntry feature) -> Task<bool>
  BuildDependencyGraph(List<FeatureEntry> features) -> FeatureDependencyGraph
  ValidateDependencies(List<FeatureEntry> features) -> void
  Dispose() -> void

Managers/SignatureExtractor.cs.content:
class SignatureExtractor
  ExtractSignatures(string filePath) -> string
  ComputeFileHash(string filePath) -> string
  GetSupportedExtensions() -> HashSet<string>

patterns: Git-tracked JSON files per feature in .spritely/features/
Haiku resolves prompt→features before Opus launch
dependencies: Haiku API for feature resolution and updates
